case_title: CHELSEA COURT OWNERS ASSOCIATION VS. BARRY BOUSHEHRI

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CHELSEA COURT OWNERS ASSOCIATION AS TO DEFENDANT BOUSHEHRI, BARRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-16-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEOFRE PRO TEM JUDGE FILED BY CHELSEA COURT OWNERS ASSOCIATION BOUSHEHRI, BARRY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-16-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-16-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF CHELSEA COURT OWNERS ASSOCIATION IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY MICHAEL BURNSTEIN, HOA PRESIDENT. DEFENDANT BARRY BOUCHEHRI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICES OF THE CLAIM. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: RICHARD GROTCH; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-16-2017 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHELSEA COURT OWNERS ASSOCIATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOUSHEHRI, BARRY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,050.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2017 ORDERED DESTROYED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO DEFENDANT BOUSHEHRI, BARRY
